src: A dish of Beef Wellington with a rich, flaky golden brown pastry crust encasing a tender, juicy pink center. Served with roasted carrots and potatoes, garnished with fresh herbs.
edit: An exquisite fine-dining dessert with a delicate, golden crust and a succulent, velvety center, garnished elegantly with fresh fruits and edible gold leaf, presenting a culinary masterpiece.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object is centrally positioned on a white plate, with caramelized sauce spread around it. The background features a wooden table setting with cutlery on both sides and a glass in the distance.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is set in the center of a white plate, surrounded by a rich sauce. The background consists of a wooden table, cutlery placed neatly, with soft, ambient lighting illuminating the scene.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is positioned prominently on a white plate, draped in a glossy sauce. A wooden table is set with cutlery and a faint glass outline, under warm, dim restaurant lighting.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object sits centered on a round white plate in a pool of sauce. Cutlery is placed beside the plate on a wooden table, with subtle background lighting enhancing the dinner setting.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object is centrally positioned on a white plate, with caramelized sauce spread around it. The luxury restaurant background features an elegant wooden table with cutlery on both sides and softly lit decor.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object is set in the center of a white plate, surrounded by a rich sauce. The luxury restaurant background consists of a sophisticated wooden table, refined cutlery, and a warm ambient glow.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object is positioned prominently on a white plate, draped in a glossy sauce. A luxury restaurant scene features a polished wooden table set with cutlery and subtle, intimate lighting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object sits centered on a round white plate in a pool of sauce. Luxury restaurant setting with cutlery beside the plate on an elegant wooden table, upscale lighting enhancing the ambiance.
